headline: Data Center Liquid Cooling Fluids Market Forecast to 2032 - Increasing Demand for Environmentally Friendly Fluid Technology and Growth in DTC Liquid Cooling Technology
summary: The increasing computing density driven by cloud computing and artificial intelligence propels this demand as traditional air cooling becomes inadequate. Key segments like hyperscale data centers and direct-to-chip cooling systems are expected to dominate, with hyperscale centers building facilities to support AI while enhancing thermal management. The water glycol mixtures segment is projected to offer exceptional thermal performance and cost efficiency. Leading players include Shell plc, The C
